title: Parathyroid clinic documentation

investigations.text: Supports thirst, polyuria, constipation, osteoporosis, fragility-fracture and renal-stone context; repeat albumin-adjusted calcium, concurrent PTH and specialist-advice documentation when clinician-selected.
investigations.rationale: Supports calcium, PTH, osteoporosis, fracture and renal-stone context for parathyroid clinic documentation; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports thirst, polyuria, constipation, osteoporosis, fragility-fracture and renal-stone context; repeat albumin-adjusted calcium, concurrent PTH and specialist-advice documentation when clinician-selected.

source.title: Hyperparathyroidism (primary): diagnosis, assessment and initial management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.1.10 — albumin-adjusted calcium and PTH testing

investigations.text: Supports clinician-reviewed vitamin D, urine calcium, renal function, DXA and renal-tract imaging in a confirmed or probable primary-hyperparathyroidism context.
investigations.rationale: Supports clinician-reviewed vitamin D, urine calcium, renal function, DXA and renal imaging for parathyroid clinic documentation; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-reviewed vitamin D, urine calcium, renal function, DXA and renal-tract imaging in a confirmed or probable primary-hyperparathyroidism context.

referral.text: Supports clinician-arranged calcium, PTH, renal-function, DXA and specialist monitoring with recommendation-specific qualifiers; no interval is auto-generated.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Diagnosis, symptoms, corrected calcium interpretation, familial context, localization imaging, operative indication, procedure, laryngeal assessment, consent and postoperative plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for parathyroid clinic documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
